Key.French: Activer le débogage de l'apparition d'artéfacts
Key.Spanish: Habilitar depuración de aparición de artefactos
Key.Italian: Abilita il debug della generazione di artefatti
Key.Portuguese: Ativar depuração de surgimento de artefatos
Key.Japanese: アーティファクトのスポーンデバッグを有効にする

Key.French: Activer ou désactiver le débogage des artéfacts
Key.Spanish: Habilitar o deshabilitar la depuración de artefactos
Key.Italian: Abilita o disabilita il debug degli artefatti
Key.Portuguese: Ativar ou desativar a depuração de artefatos
Key.Japanese: アーティファクトのデバッグを有効または無効にする
Key.Turkish: Eser hata ayıklamasını etkinleştir veya devre dışı bırak

Key.Japanese: アーティファクトのスポーンエリア

Key.English: ELLIPSE or RECTANGLE marker names covering the artifact spawn areas as strings ['Artifact_spawn_1', 'Artifact_spawn_2']
Key.Czech: Názvy markerů ELLIPSE nebo RECTANGLE pokrývající oblasti vytváření artefaktů jako řetězce ['Artifact_spawn_1', 'Artifact_spawn_2']
Key.French: Noms des marqueurs ELLIPSE ou RECTANGLE couvrant les zones d'apparition sous forme de chaînes ['Artifact_spawn_1', 'Artifact_spawn_2']
Key.Spanish: Nombres de marcadores ELLIPSE o RECTANGLE que cubren las áreas de aparición como cadenas ['Artifact_spawn_1', 'Artifact_spawn_2']
Key.Italian: Nomi dei marcatori ELLIPSE o RECTANGLE che coprono le aree di generazione come stringhe ['Artifact_spawn_1', 'Artifact_spawn_2']
Key.Polish: Nazwy markerów ELLIPSE lub RECTANGLE pokrywające obszary spawnowania jako ciągi znaków ['Artifact_spawn_1', 'Artifact_spawn_2']
Key.Portuguese: Nomes dos marcadores ELLIPSE ou RECTANGLE cobrindo as áreas de surgimento como strings ['Artifact_spawn_1', 'Artifact_spawn_2']
Key.Russian: Имена маркеров ELLIPSE или RECTANGLE, охватывающие зоны появления, в виде строк ['Artifact_spawn_1', 'Artifact_spawn_2']
Key.German: ELLIPSE- oder RECTANGLE-Markernamen, die die Artefakt-Spawn-Gebiete abdecken, als Strings ['Artifact_spawn_1', 'Artifact_spawn_2']
Key.Korean: 아티팩트 스폰 구역을 포함하는 ELLIPSE 또는 RECTANGLE 마커 이름 (문자열 형식) ['Artifact_spawn_1', 'Artifact_spawn_2']
Key.Japanese: アーティファクトのスポーンエリアをカバーする ELLIPSE または RECTANGLE マーカーの名前。文字列形式 ['Artifact_spawn_1', 'Artifact_spawn_2']
Key.Chinese: 覆蓋神器生成區域的 ELLIPSE 或 RECTANGLE 標記名稱，格式為字符串 ['Artifact_spawn_1', 'Artifact_spawn_2']
Key.Chinesesimp: 覆盖神器生成区域的 ELLIPSE 或 RECTANGLE 标记名称，格式为字符串 ['Artifact_spawn_1', 'Artifact_spawn_2']
Key.Turkish: Eser oluşum alanlarını kapsayan dize biçimindeki ELLIPSE veya RECTANGLE işaretçi adları ['Artifact_spawn_1', 'Artifact_spawn_2']
